Open Challenge/2022/The_Grind |this=2 }} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |lang=English |b1=Fyxs |b2=Arka |b3=Saltyy }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Mazy |b3=AnkiiiBOT }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Battlegrounds Mobile India Open Challenge 2022:''' 4th April 2022 to 15th May 2022'' Maps: {{Abbr/TBA}} * '''''In-game Qualifiers:''' 4th April 2022 to 10th April 2022'' ** Open for all ** In-game qualifiers will be held to determine the contenders for the online qualifiers. ** Every registered squad will be required to play 15 matches, out of which 10 best games will be taken into consideration for qualification. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 512 teams}} advance to '''''Online-Qualifiers''''' * '''''Online-Qualifiers:''' 21st April 2022 to 15th May 2022'' * '''''Round 1:''' 21st April 2022 to 24th April 2022'' ** '''''512 Teams''''' ** These 512 teams will be divided into 32 groups ** Each group will play a total of 5 matches ** Top 8 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''Round 2'''''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''256 teams}} advance to '''''Round 2''''' * '''''Round 2:''' 27th April 2022 to 30th April 2022'' ** '''''256 Teams''''' ** These 256 teams will be divided into 16 groups ** Each group will play a total of 5 matches ** Top 4 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''Round 3'''''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''64 teams}} advance to '''''Round 3''''' * '''''Round 3:''' 5th May 2022 to 8th May 2022'' ** '''''64 Teams''''' ** These 64 teams will be divided into 4 groups ** Each group will play a total of 6 matches ** Top 8 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''Round 4'''''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''32 teams}} advance to '''''Round 4''''' * '''''Round 4:''' 11th May 2022 to 15th May 2022'' ** '''''64 Teams:''''' 32 Teams from Round 3 + 32 Invited teams ** These 64 teams will be divided into 4 groups ** Each group will play a total of 6 matches ** Top 6 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''[[Battlegrounds Mobile India Pro Series/Season 1|BMPS S1]]'''''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''24 teams}} advance to '''''[[Battlegrounds Mobile India Pro Series/Season 1|BMPS S1]]''''' ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ===Prize Pool=== {{prize pool
